src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update import path to reflect the package restructuring of the MessageResponse class.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Compilation error: class 'MessageResponse' not found in the old package path.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Migrate from the deprecated imperative `and()`-based Spring Security DSL to the modern lambda-based functional DSL.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The `and()` method and imperative configuration style are deprecated in Spring Security 5.7+ and removed in Spring Security 6; code using them will fail to compile or throw runtime errors in Spring Boot 3.x (which requires Java 17+ and is the standard for Java 21 migrations).

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update security configuration to use `withDefaults()` for CORS and `AbstractHttpConfigurer::disable` for CSRF.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The imperative `.cors()` and `.csrf().disable()` calls are part of the deprecated API; the new functional API requires `withDefaults()` or method references to `AbstractHttpConfigurer`.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Refactor `authorizeHttpRequests` to use the new lambda-based request matcher syntax.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The old `authorizeRequests` lambda often relied on implicit matchers or deprecated methods; the new syntax explicitly chains `.requestMatchers()` within the lambda.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update frame options configuration to use the new lambda syntax.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The imperative `.headers().frameOptions().sameOrigin()` is deprecated; the new API uses `.headers(headers -> headers.frameOptions(frameOptions -> frameOptions.disable()))`.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update exception handling configuration to use the new lambda syntax.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The imperative `.exceptionHandling().authenticationEntryPoint(...)` is deprecated; the new API uses `.exceptionHandling(ex -> ex.authenticationEntryPoint(...))`.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update session management configuration to use the new lambda syntax.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The imperative `.sessionManagement().sessionCreationPolicy(...)` is deprecated; the new API uses `.sessionManagement(session -> session.sessionCreationPolicy(...))`.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Add import for `Customizer.withDefaults` required by the new Spring Security DSL.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: The new DSL uses `withDefaults()` for CORS and other configurations, requiring this static import.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Move import for MessageResponse to a new package path reflecting a refactoring of the auth module.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Compile error: class 'MessageResponse' not found in old package path.

src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.general_idea: Update import path for MessageResponse to reflect package restructuring.
src/main/java/org/springframework/sample.why_exists: Class not found compile error due to moved package location
